steps.title: Identify the text's focus
steps.content: The passage begins with archaeologists uncovering a food shop in Pompeii, then describes the remains, artwork, decorations, and what those findings reveal about daily life.

steps.title: Keep the purpose broad
steps.content: Choice A discusses politics, Choice C discusses climate, and Choice D invents a comparison between ancient and modern artworks. The remaining choice captures the passage's purpose: presenting an archaeological discovery. The answer is B.
